perturbation.original_text: This Agreement is governed by and shall be construed in accor dance with the laws of the People ’s Republic of China without regard to principles of conflict of law, and any dispute arising out of this Agreement or In connection with this Agreement shall be referred to Hong Kong International Arbitration Centre (HKIAC) for arbitration in accordance with Hong Kong Interna tional Arbitration Centre (HKIAC) administered arbitration rules in force at the time of application. The arbitrators shall be one (1). The place of arbitration shall be in Shen Zhen, China . The language used in arbitration proceeding shall be English Lang uage. Both parties will keep in strict confidential of all information relating to the dispute. Both parties shall continue to perform their respective obligations which are not in dispute. Nothing here shall be interpreted as preventing the aggrieved party from seeking court injunction, interim measures, and protective order from competent court in relevant jurisdiction.
perturbation.changed_text: All notices, demands or other communications delivered in connection with this Agreement shall be delivered by facsimile tr ansmissions or mail and shall be deemed effective upon receipt: If to Customer Address: __________________________________________________________________ If to Seeed : Address: 1F, Tower B, Building 2, Shanshui Building, NanshanYungu Innovation Industry Park, Liuxian Ave, Nanshan District, Shenzhen, Guangdong. , China. P.R.C Or at such other address or to such fax number , email address as may be designated by notice from such Party. This Agreement is governed by and shall be construed in accor dance with the laws of the People ’s Republic of China without regard to principles of conflict of law, and any dispute arising out of this Agreement or In connection with this Agreement shall be referred to Hong Kong International Arbitration Centre (HKIAC) for arbitration in accordance with Hong Kong Interna tional Arbitration Centre (HKIAC) administered arbitration rules in force at the time of application. The arbitrators shall be one (1). The place of arbitration shall be in Shen Zhen, China . The language used in arbitration proceeding shall be English Lang uage. Both parties will keep in strict confidential of all information relating to the dispute. Both parties shall continue to perform their respective obligations which are not in dispute. Nothing here shall be interpreted as preventing the aggrieved party from seeking court injunction, interim measures, and protective order from competent court in relevant jurisdiction.
perturbation.explanation: The arbitration clause is moved to the 'Notices' section. In many jurisdictions, arbitration clauses are required to be prominently displayed and easily accessible. Placing it within the notice section obscures it and makes it harder to find.
perturbation.law_citation: Article 18 of the Arbitration Law of the People's Republic of China
perturbation.law_explanation: Article 18 of the Arbitration Law of the People's Republic of China implies that the arbitration agreement must be a clear and distinct part of the contract. Placing it within the notices section might render it less conspicuous and potentially unenforceable, especially if it's argued that it was not brought to the attention of the parties in a clear manner.
perturbation.justification: The perturbation explanation states that the arbitration clause was moved to the 'Notices' section. The law explanation says that Article 18 of the Arbitration Law of the People's Republic of China implies that the arbitration agreement must be a clear and distinct part of the contract, and placing it within the notices section might render it less conspicuous and potentially unenforceable. Since this falls under the definition of 'Structural Flaws - Legal Contradiction' by placing a required legal disclosure in an irrelevant section, a contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: The breaching party shall pay to non -beaching party a liquidated damage of 10,000 USD per occurrence . The total liquidated damage shall not exceed 1,0000,000 USD. The application of liquidated damage shall not prejudice the aggrieved party ’s right to claim for all the losses and shall not prejudice all the liabilities and obligations incurred . Nothing he re shall be interpreted as excluding consequential losses the aggrieved party may suffer, including without limitation to loss of profit, loss of goodwill, loss of business opportunities .
perturbation.changed_text: The Parties shall not alter or remove from any Confidential Information any proprietary rights legend, copyright notice, trademark or trade secret legend, or any other mark id entifying the material as Confidential Information. The breaching party shall pay to non -beaching party a liquidated damage of 10,000 USD per occurrence . The total liquidated damage shall not exceed 1,0000,000 USD. The application of liquidated damage shall not prejudice the aggrieved party ’s right to claim for all the losses and shall not prejudice all the liabilities and obligations incurred . Nothing he re shall be interpreted as excluding consequential losses the aggrieved party may suffer, including without limitation to loss of profit, loss of goodwill, loss of business opportunities .
perturbation.explanation: Liquidated damages provisions are crucial for clarifying the potential financial repercussions of breaching the agreement. By embedding it within the section about 'Proprietary Rights Legend' which is about protecting confidential information, there is an argument that the liquidated damages section is about not removing proprietary legends and not about actual breach of contract.
perturbation.contradicted_law: Contract Law of the People's Republic of China
perturbation.law_citation: Article 114 of the Contract Law of the People's Republic of China
perturbation.law_explanation: Article 114 of the Contract Law of the People's Republic of China stipulates that parties can agree upon the payment of a certain amount if one party breaches the contract. The placement of the liquidated damages clause within the 'Proprietary Rights Legend' section undermines its clarity and enforceability as a general remedy for any breach of the entire contract, potentially contradicting the intent of Article 114.

perturbation.justification: The perturbation explanation states that the liquidated damages provision, a crucial element regarding financial repercussions of a breach, is placed within a section concerning 'Proprietary Rights Legend'. This placement, as highlighted in the law explanation, undermines its clarity and enforceability as a general remedy for any breach, creating a structural flaw. The original text clearly outlines the liquidated damages in its own section. By moving it, the contract violates the condition that structural flaws can create a legal contradiction when a required legal disclosure is placed in an irrelevant or misleading section, making it difficult for parties to locate or interpret.
